subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath made the line, formed from the Primal Point manifest in the letter Bá, the adorning seal of His Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل الخط المتکون من النقطه الاولیه الظاهره بالباء طراز الختم لاسمه
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @creation of the world, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @apocalyptic imagery
